summary: Tested commission feature backend + frontend flows for public config, matching artists, commission request page rendering, upload-url contract, and new commission routes. Core public flows work; one backend validation bug found.

critical.issue: Invalid category returns 200 with {artists: []} when Supabase is unconfigured, instead of 400 validation error.

minor.issue: Authenticated positive path (presigned URL generation with bucket_key) could not be executed due missing test credentials/auth session in preview. Unauthenticated contract correctly returns 401/403.

integration_issues.issue: Route /dashboard/commissions redirects to /login without authenticated artist session; pending response buttons cannot be runtime-validated in this run.

action_items: Fix validation order in /api/public/commission/matching-artists: validate category before Supabase availability guard.
Provide a non-production artist test credential/session to validate pending-request action controls and authenticated upload-url presign flow.
Align product wording for Digital category (requirement says 'Digital', API key currently 'Digital Art') if strict label compatibility is expected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/public/commission/matching-artists checks Supabase null before category validation, masking invalid-input errors.
server.py _resolve_upload_bucket allows fallback default bucket when bucket_key missing, which can violate strict bucket separation policy if callers omit bucket_key.
frontend/src/services/api.js still contains localhost fallback; this violates strict env-only URL policy in deployment-sensitive setups.

success_rate.frontend: 80% (public commission route/integration checks passed; auth-gated flows blocked)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Use authenticated artist+user sessions to verify: upload-url presigned payload returns uploadUrl/publicUrl for commission-references and artist-artworks buckets, and artist pending request accept/counter/reject interactions update state. Public endpoints currently reachable at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and return expected config with flat pricing models.
rca of the issue: Repro: GET /api/public/commission/matching-artists?category=InvalidCategory&budget=50000 returns 200. RCA: endpoint returns early when Supabase is not configured (if not supabase: return {artists: []}) before executing category whitelist check, so invalid input bypasses validation. Mitigation: move category validation before Supabase null guard or always validate request params first.
